mapper.insert: INSERT INTO column_definition (model_id, column_name, display_name, description, data_type, column_type, is_nullable, default_value, properties) VALUES (#{modelId}, #{columnName}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{dataType}, #{columnType}, #{isNullable}, #{defaultValue}, #{properties})
mapper.update: UPDATE column_definition SET model_id = #{modelId}, column_name = #{columnName}, display_name = #{displayName}, description = #{description}, data_type = #{dataType}, column_type = #{columnType}, is_nullable = #{isNullable}, default_value = #{defaultValue}, properties = #{properties} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM column_definition WHERE model_id = #{modelId} ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM column_definition WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND column_name = #{columnName}
SELECT * FROM column_definition WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND column_type = #{columnType} ORDER BY id
